creator: raimeetravel
caption:
For the non-solo travelers, these have been my fave places to travel with friends! 

Many of these places I’ve also visited solo, but actually preferred to be there with my girls. There are some other places I’ve preferred to be solo though! 

I’ve prioritized making friend & group trips happen more and it’s been the best investment 🥹🩷 I know it’s not easy to get the trip out of the group chat & align budgets with everyone but it’s definitely an effort that’s worth it. 

Where are your fave solo/non-solo destinations? 

#solotravel #girlstrip #bestdestinations

transcription.text: I always see these lists about where to go for a solo female traveler. I love those lists, but if you want to travel with a friend, you don't want to travel solo, but you're still wondering like where to go, where is safe. These are the best places. First one, a summer road trip through the Provence region of France. You can visit these beautiful lavender fields, these cute little towns with gorgeous markets and then drive all the way down to the coast where you can party, meet people. There's always so many festivals happening during the summer in France as well. Highly recommend. Next place, Seoul, South Korea, and you already know we're going to get beauty treatments there together and have some of the best food. I found Korea to be so affordable as well, so I think this would be a great place to go as a group of girlfriends. Also extremely safe. Next, Antigua, Guatemala. I felt very safe here. I was here with a group of girls. We had the best time. We visited Habatanango. We had amazing food and the city is so colorful. You're going to want to take a million photos and you definitely need your girlfriends here to help you accomplish that. Plus you can also hike the nearby volcano together or go down to Lake Atitlan and have like a super relaxing chill time. Guatemala is for the girls. Also Edinburgh, Scotland is amazing, especially if you guys are into books, Harry Potter or just anything fantasy. This city is so mystical. If you visit in August, it's a really fun time because they have Fringe Festival going on where there's comedy, art, books, all of these really, really cool shows and events happening. We highly recommend going there with your girls in the summer. Okay, that's part one. There's definitely more places and like I said, there's places I've preferred to be solo in. So let me know if you're curious about that as well and I will share some more next time.
